firmware.title: LE2121_11_C.40_202112261318
firmware.description:
New version: LE2121_11_C.40_202112261318 System

• Fixed the issue of system upgrade failure in specific scenarios

Network

• Fixed the issue of being unable to access the 5G network in some scenarios

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1

firmware.description:
New version: LE2123_11.C.61_1610_202206141855 System

[Improved] system stability

[Optimized] the fluency of system

[Fixed] the issue that clearing the background worked abnormally

[Updated] Android security patch to 2022.05

Camera

[Fixed] the occasional issue that camera crashed abnormally

[Fixed] the issue that photos did not display the right location information

Network

[Fixed] the issue that the mobile data network was unstable in some scenarios

Communication

[Fixed] the occasional issue for call dialing

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1

firmware.title: LE2125_14.0.0.600(EX01)
firmware.description:
New Version Available: LE2125_14.0.0.600(EX01)

A new software update is now available for your Android smartphone.

System

• You can now try out the "app-specific volume" feature to adjust the volume for individual apps based on your needs.

 • You can now create photo collages without frames in Photos.

 • Adds a "Partial screenshot" option in the Smart Sidebar.

 • You can now press and hold the Volume Down button to turn the torch on when the screen is off.

  • You can now enter the first letter of an app name for a fuzzy search from the app library in the task bar.

 • Improves system stability and performance.

• Integrates the April 2024 Android security patch to enhance system security.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1
